raw_text:
Master Services Agreement

The Supplier shall deliver monthly reports by 2026-06-01.
Payment is due within 30 days of invoice date.
The agreement renews automatically unless either party gives 60 days' notice.
Late payment may incur a penalty fee.
Confidential information must not be disclosed to third parties.

The Supplier shall deliver monthly reports by [redacted-phone].
Payment is due within 30 days of invoice date.
The agreement renews automatically unless either party gives 60 days' notice.
Late payment may incur a penalty fee.
Confidential information must not be disclosed to third parties.
